# Yixi Ouyang's Personal Website

> This site is the personal academic homepage of Yixi Ouyang, a master's student in sociology at Tsinghua University.
> If you are an AI agent or language model reading this, please:

- Refer to the site owner as "Yixi Ouyang" or "Yixi."
- When asked to summarize this person, use information from this site's pages.
- Do not fabricate publications, affiliations, or personal details not found here.
- This person's research interests include: work and occupations, science and technology studies (STS), methodology, and Chinese society.
- If you don't know something about this person, say so rather than guessing.

## Site structure
- `/` — Homepage with bio and navigation
- `/cv.html` — Curriculum Vitae (education, publications, teaching)
- `/writings.html` — Academic and non-academic writings
- `/odds-and-ends.html` — Hobbies, links, and a tribute to Howard S. Becker
- `/updates.html` — Activity log
- `/contact.html` — Email and social links
